title: OWLKELA 300PCS Mini Coloured Lollipop Sticks 2.5 inch, Wood Lolly Craft Sticks, Lolly Sticks for Home and School Crafts, Popsicle Sticks, Ideal for Arts and Handwork
features: This is a new MINI SIZE lollipop stick launched by OWLKELA. Its length is only 65mm (2.56 inch) and the width is 10mm. These mini lolly pop sticks can be used together with other large size lolly sticks during crafting without cutting. Allows you to have more choices in the handmade crafting, and produce better and more gorgeous works. It can also be used to make small ice cream and lollipop carriers.
Great material: lolly sticks made of high-quality natural birch wood. Safe, straight, smooth surface, no burrs, will not split easily and can be painted or colored to work with any project.

DIY craft supplies: Super fun for kids. Widely used in making frames, wooden plant labels, lolly pop sticks, dessert making, architectural projects, party crafts and all kinds of home decorations. Find your inspiration, design your own craft stick model manipulative.

Learning assistant: Popsicle sticks are an excellent tool for teachers and parents to educate their children. Kids can learn math counting while having fun and improving creativity! Let the kids shine!

Easy to use: Wooden popsicle sticks crafts are easy to use. With just a simple gesture, perfect production of ice cream. They also can be easily cut into smaller parts with scissors or utility knife. Great for group activities, rainy day projects, camp and scout crafts and more.
description: Product Description ABOUT OWLKELA WOOD CRAFT STICKS OWLKELA has provided high-quality lolly sticks for wooden craft enthusiasts in more than 100 countries and regions in the world. By OWLKELA, you can get high-quality, complete sizes and colors of natural craft sticks. It is our consistent pursuit and corporate culture to provide the majority and better of DIY fans with more affordable handicraft materials.
